text: Breaking: Scientists confirm a miracle fruit cures every disease overnight.
City council approved the 2026 public transport budget after a 3-hour meeting.
Anonymous post claims banks will shut down tomorrow nationwide.
Weather agency forecasts moderate rain in coastal areas this weekend.
Viral thread says drinking bleach protects from seasonal flu.
Local school announces scholarship applications open until June 30.
Rumor: New law bans all home internet starting next month.
Health ministry publishes updated vaccination schedule for children.
Unverified video claims earthquake predicted exactly by social media influencer.
University researchers release peer-reviewed study on solar panel efficiency.
Post says celebrities are paid to hide evidence of flat earth.
Airport authority reports temporary delays due to fog conditions.
Chain message warns that 5G towers control human thoughts.
Public library expands digital access with new e-book platform.
Claim: government confirms aliens running stock exchanges secretly.
Hospital opens new emergency wing to reduce patient wait times.
Social post alleges all bottled water contains tracking nanobots.
Energy regulator announces gradual electricity tariff revision for 2027.
Blog claims moon landing footage was recorded in a mall parking lot.
Farmers cooperative reports improved crop yields after irrigation upgrades.
Viral caption says vaccines instantly rewrite human DNA forever.
State police publish official road safety advisory before holidays.
Post suggests all elections are decided by a hidden algorithm from one company.
Museum announces free entry day for students and teachers.
Conspiracy page says satellites can read private thoughts in real time.
National statistics office releases quarterly employment report.
Message claims a common herb is officially approved to replace surgery.
Transit app launches accessibility improvements for visually impaired users.
Anonymous account says major dam collapse is guaranteed tonight.
Regional health department starts free blood pressure screening campaign.
